textPlain: > Microsoft has only kept the documentation for the DX8 version of EnumDevices left onlineThis saddens me. Who knows how much valuable info has been lost. I recall back in the days of MSDN, we had docs back to early Windows, and it was a wonderful historical record. Today's Docs site seems to keep info only for a few versions.
Another good reason to support independent internet archives
Why share something which you can sell for exorbitant prices? /s
